conflict: Magic is dying and every conventional avenue is exhausted; the only remaining lead requires entering the site of her worst trauma
consequence: Hermione moves from contained researcher to someone who must enter the Manor — the decision costs her control and sleep
must_land_beats: Establish dying magic through specific daily failures, not exposition
Show Hermione's competence-as-armor: divorced, alone, work as identity
The Mudblood scar glimpsed once — sleeve adjustment, glamour — establishing concealment as habit
The Malfoy library proposition arrives and she decides to go
pressure_source: Magic is dying and every conventional avenue is exhausted; the only remaining lead requires entering the site of her worst trauma
secondary_character_beats: Harry present through brief contact — a fire-call or note — warm but she deflects his concern

setups_to_plant.description: Hermione adjusts her sleeve or checks a glamour — habitual, automatic, establishing the scar as something she hides from everyone
Specific spell failures and institutional strain that establish the scale of the crisis

state_shift: Hermione moves from contained researcher to someone who must enter the Manor — the decision costs her control and sleep
